content: agent2: implementing get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor in ImageBlock, file: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py. Will touch image_to_base64 too.

Merged your normalize_image_bytes helper into agent2 branch; resolved the image_to_base64 conflict by having get_image_mimetype() call normalize_image_bytes internally for decoding. Tests pass (12/12 in test_types.py). Pushed to team/agent2.
